G

GameFrame - Class in view
Class to build the frame to draw on the screen
GameFrame(String, GamePanel) - Constructor for class view.GameFrame
Class constructor
gameOverState - Variable in class view.UI
 
gameOverState(int) - Method in class controller.KeyHandler
Method to handle the specific case of a key pressed while on the Game Over screen
GamePanel - Class in view
Main class for the view, to handle the view of the game and drew the objects on the screen.
GameStateManager - Class in controller
Utility class to set and retrieve the current game state to use them in various parts of the project
GameStateManager() - Constructor for class controller.GameStateManager
 
getBomberMan() - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Getter for the number of of BomberMan-lives.
getBombImage() - Method in class view.BombView
Method to assign the images to draw the animation for the bombs
getBombs() - Static method in class model.Bomb
Gets the ArrayList of the bombs
getCanCollide() - Method in class model.Bomb
Getter for the boolean canCollide, that's used to check if the player has moved from where it placed the bomb to start the collision checking
getCollision() - Method in class model.SuperObject
Getter for the collision of the object
getCollision() - Method in class view.Tile
Getter for the collision
getCoolDown() - Static method in class model.Bomb
Cooldown counter before placing another bomb
getDefaultSpeed() - Method in class model.Character
Gets the default speed of the character
getDirection() - Method in class model.Character
Gets the direction where the character is facing or is moving to
getExplosionCounter() - Method in class view.Explosion
Getter for the explosion counter, to manage the explosion duration
getExplosionImage() - Method in class view.Explosion
Method to assign the image to draw for the explosion on a single tile
getExplosions() - Static method in class view.Explosion
Gets the array of all the explosions
getExplosions(int) - Static method in class view.Explosion
Gets the element at the index i in the array of the explosions (overloading)
getFirepower() - Static method in class view.Explosion
Gets the distance covered by an explosion
getGameOverState() - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Getter for the game over state
getGameState() - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Getter for the gameState
getImage() - Method in class view.Heart
Gets the image
getImage() - Method in class view.Tile
Getter for the image
getInstance() - Static method in class model.ModelAssets
Public method to return the single instance of the class or, if not present, to create it with the private constructor before returning it
getInstance() - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Public getter for the instance of the PlayerModel class.
getInstance() - Static method in class view.GamePanel
Gets the single instance of this class, if present; otherwise, it creates one using the private constructor
getInvincibleCounter() - Method in class model.Character
Gets the counter for the invincibility period
getIsBreakable() - Method in class view.Tile
Getter for the isBreakable field
getIsVisible() - Method in class model.Monster
Getter for the isVisible field
getIsVisible() - Method in class view.MonsterView
Getter for the field isVisible
getKnockBackCounter() - Method in class model.Character
Getter for the counter of the knockback animation (to control its duration)
getLives() - Method in class model.Monster
Getter for the current lives left to the monster
getLives() - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Getter for the lives of the player
getMapTileNum() - Method in class view.TileManager
Gets the matrix of the map
getMaxLife() - Method in class model.Monster
Getter for the maxLife of a monster
getMaxNumBombs() - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Getter for the max number of bombs that can be placed
getMonsterImage() - Method in class view.UI
Method to get the image for the monsters to draw in the title screen from the resource folder
getMonsterImage(String) - Method in class view.MonsterView
Assigns the images to draw the animation for the monsters
getMonstersView() - Static method in class view.MonsterView
Gets the array containing all the monsters to draw on the screen
getName() - Method in class model.Monster
Getter for the name of the monster
getName() - Method in class model.SuperObject
Getter for the name of the object
getPauseState() - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Getter for the pause state
getPlayerImage() - Method in class view.PlayerView
Assigns the images to draw the animations of the player
getPlayerLevel() - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Getter for the player's level
getPlayerView() - Method in class view.GamePanel
Getter for the playerView
getPlayState() - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Getter for the normal play state
getProfileCreationState() - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Getter for the profile-selection state
getProfileState() - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Getter fot the profile state
getScore() - Static method in class model.PlayerModel
Getter for the score of the current level
getSolidArea() - Method in class model.Entity
Getter for the solid area of the entity, useful in other classes to check the collisions
getSolidAreaDefaultX() - Method in class model.Entity
Getter for the default value of the x component (of the upper-left vertex) of the solid area, useful to have because the solid area can be modified during the collision-checking
getSolidAreaDefaultY() - Method in class model.Entity
Getter for the default value of the y component (of the upper-left vertex) of the solid area, useful to have because the solid area can be modified during the collision-checking
getSpeed() - Method in class model.Character
Getter for the speed
getSpriteCounter() - Method in class model.Character
Gets the sprite counter, a value to avoid to change sprite too quickly
getSpriteCounter() - Method in class view.BombView
Getter for the sprite counter (that counts the frames before having to change to the next sprite)
getSpriteCounter() - Method in class view.Explosion
Getter for the sprite counter (that counts the frames before having to change to the next sprite)
getSpriteNumber() - Method in class model.Character
Gets the number to indicate the sprite to use
getSpriteNumber() - Method in class view.BombView
Gets the sprite number
getSpriteNumber() - Method in class view.Explosion
Gets the sprite number
getTileImage() - Method in class view.TileManager
Assigns the images for the tiles of the map
getTileManager() - Method in class view.GamePanel
Getter for the tile manager
getTiles() - Method in class view.TileManager
Gets the array with all the tiles
getTileSize() - Method in class view.GamePanel
Getter for the tile size
getTimeElapsed() - Method in class model.Bomb
Gets the time elapsed since the bomb was placed
getTimeToDetonate() - Method in class model.Bomb
Getter for the max time to wait between the placement of a bomb and the explosion
getTitleState() - Static method in class controller.GameStateManager
Getter for the title state
getUi() - Method in class view.GamePanel
Getter for the instance of the ui
getViewDirection() - Method in class view.MonsterView
Gets the direction of the monster
getViewDirection() - Method in class view.PlayerView
Gets the direction of the player
getViewInvincible() - Method in class view.MonsterView
Gets the invincibility state of the monster to modify how it's drawn
getViewInvincible() - Method in class view.PlayerView
Gets the invincibility state of the player to modify how it's drawn
getViewSpriteNumber() - Method in class view.MonsterView
Gets the number of the sprite to use to draw the monster
getViewSpriteNumber() - Method in class view.PlayerView
Gets the number of the sprite to use to draw the player
getViewX() - Method in class view.MonsterView
Gets the x-coordinate for the view package to draw the monster
getViewX() - Method in class view.PlayerView
Gets the x-coordinate for the view package to draw the player
getViewY() - Method in class view.MonsterView
Gets the y-coordinate to draw the monster on screen
getViewY() - Method in class view.PlayerView
Gets the y-coordinate to draw the player on screen
getX() - Method in class model.Entity
Getter for the x-coordinate
getX() - Method in class model.PlayerModel
Getter for the x-coordinate in pixels
getX() - Method in class model.PowerUp
Getter for the x-coordinate
getX() - Method in class view.BombView
Getter for the x coordinate of the bomb (the tile of the bomb)
getX() - Method in class view.Explosion
Getter for the x coordinate of the center of the explosion
getXForAlignToRightText(String, int) - Method in class view.UI
Calculates the correct x-coordinate to use for right aligned text
getXForCenteredText(String) - Method in class view.UI
Calculates the correct x-coordinate to use for a centered text
getY() - Method in class model.Entity
Getter for the y-coordinate
getY() - Method in class model.PlayerModel
Getter for the y-coordinate in pixels
getY() - Method in class model.PowerUp
Getter for the y-coordinate
getY() - Method in class view.BombView
Getter for the y coordinate of the bomb (the tile of the bomb)
getY() - Method in class view.Explosion
Getter for the y coordinate of the center of the explosion
